name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn
N \in Nat
N > 0

(* State variables *)
state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
turn \in 1..N

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ turn \in 1..N
        /\ \A p \in 1..N : state[p] = "idle"

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
          /\ turn' = p
        \/ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
          /\ turn' = turn

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a sequence of length N where each element is either 0 (free) or the index of the philosopher who holds it *)
(* States: a sequence of length N where each element is one of {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks
        \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ forks[(i \mod N) + 1] = 0
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![(i \mod N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[(i \mod N) + 1] = i
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![(i \mod N) + 1] = 0]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = 0
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ num' = num + 1
        /\ flag' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = num' THEN 1 ELSE flag[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = Follower

Next == \/ /\ state = Follower
          /\ state' = Candidate
             /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
             /\ votedFor' = Self
          \/ /\ state = Candidate
             /\ state' = Leader
             /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
             /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          \/ /\ state = Leader
             /\ state' = Leader
             /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
             /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ r' \in 1..10 \\
             /\ r' \notin readers \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
             /\ readers' = Append(readers, r') \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' \in 1..10 \\
                /\ r' \notin readers \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
                /\ readers' = Remove(readers, r') \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' \in 1..10 \\
                /\ r' \notin readers \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = readers \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' \in 1..10 \\
                /\ r' \notin readers \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = Remove(readers, r') \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' \in 1..10 \\
                /\ r' \notin readers \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
                /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ---- EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets CONSTANTS InitState, Message, N VARIABLES state, channel, snapshot, marker N, \* Number of processes channels, \* Set of all channels: <, , ...> initState, \* Initial state of each process initChannel, \* Initial state of each channel \* Helper definitions \* Channel state: a sequence of messages channelState(p, q) == channel[<>] \* Marker messages: a set of channels where markers are in transit markerState(p, q) == marker[<>] \* Snapshot status: a set of processes that have recorded their state snapshotState(p) == snapshot[<

>] \* TypeOK: ensures all variables have correct types TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> InitState] /\ channel \in [channels -> Seq(Message)] /\ snapshot \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN] /\ marker \in [channels -> BOOLEAN] \* Init: initial state of each process and channel Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> initState[p]] /\ channel = [c \in channels |-> initChannel[c]] /\ snapshot = [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE] /\ marker = [c \in channels |-> FALSE] \* Next: possible actions Next == \/ \E p \in 1..N : \E q \in 1..N : p # q /\ channel[<>] = <<>> \* No message in transit /\ marker[<>] = FALSE /\ \E msg \in Message : /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![<>] = Append(channel[<>], msg)] /\ UNCHANGED <> \/ \E p \in 1..N : \E q \in 1..N : p # q /\ channel[<>] \in Seq(Message) /\ marker[<>] = FALSE /\ \E msg \in Message : /\ channel[<>] = <> \* Single message in transit /\ \E newState \in InitState : /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = newState] /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE] /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![<>] = TRUE] /\ UNCHANGED <> \/ \E p \in 1..N : \E q \in 1..N : p # q /\ channel[<>] \in Seq(Message) /\ marker[<>] = TRUE /\ \E msg \in Message : /\ channel[<>] = <> \* Single message in transit /\ \E newState \in InitState : /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = newState] /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE] /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![<>] = FALSE] /\ UNCHANGED <> Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<> ====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHUNK_ID, CHUNK_DATA, CHUNK_SEQ, CHUNK_ACK, CHUNK_LOST, CHUNK_RETRANSMIT
VARIABLES retransmit_counts, sent_chunks

    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ acked_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_counts = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in chunks :
        /\ chunk \notin sent_chunks
        /\ chunk \notin acked_chunks
        /\ \E attempt \in 1..MAX_RETRIES :
            /\ attempt = 1
            /\ \E lost \in BOOLEAN :
                /\ lost = FALSE
                /\ sent_chunks' = Append(sent_chunks, chunk)
                /\ retransmit_counts' = Append(retransmit_counts, 1)
            \/ lost = TRUE
                /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
                /\ retransmit_counts' = Append(retransmit_counts, 1)
    \/ \E chunk \in acked_chunks :
        /\ \E attempt \in 1..MAX_RETRIES :
            /\ attempt = 1
            /\ \E lost \in BOOLEAN :
                /\ lost = FALSE
                /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
                /\ retransmit_counts' = Append(retransmit_counts, 1)
            \/ lost = TRUE
                /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
                /\ retransmit_counts' = Append(retransmit_counts, 1)
    \/ \E chunk \in sent_chunks :
        /\ chunk \notin acked_chunks
        /\ \E attempt \in 1..MAX_RETRIES :
            /\ attempt = 1
            /\ \E lost \in BOOLEAN :
                /\ lost = FALSE
                /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
                /\ retransmit_counts' = Append(retransmit_counts, 1)
            \/ lost = TRUE
                /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
                /\ retransmit_counts' = Append(retransmit_counts, 1)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, drift, epsilon, sync



Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> -> 0]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat
        /\ drift \in Nat
        /\ sync \in Nat

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = clocks[i] + drift + offsets[i]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : offsets[i] = offsets[i] + (Avg(clocks) - clocks[i]) \div sync

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = infected \cup known

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in Pages \ free
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq free
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1}
        /\ \A i \in {0,1} : wants[i] = 0

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1, ![1] = 0]
          /\ \A i \in {0,1} : i # 0 => wants'[i] = wants[i]
        \/ /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 0, ![1] = 1]
          /\ \A i \in {0,1} : i # 1 => wants'[i] = wants[i]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
        /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A n \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
        \/ \A n, m \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [k \in Node |-> Max(counts[n][k], counts[m][k])]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]
          /\ \A n \in Node: \A m \in Node: counts[n][m] \in Nat

====
